/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib -L/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib  -L/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs CMakeFiles/tri_solve_tensor.dir/main.cu.o -o tri_solve_tensor  /home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib/libcusparse.so /home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib/libcudart.so /home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/lib/libcublas.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/home/guomingfeng/miniconda3/envs/cuda12/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
